calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-02-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclaire.
Eric Shiu, Esq. for Plaintiff: CNET Networks, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: Guy Lugliani, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: LTDNETWORK, Inc., a Delaware corporation as follows:
Principal $89,694.92
Prejudgment Interest $18,432.62
Attorney's Fees $3,575.00
Costs $577.50, for a total of $112,280.04
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2005 Continued To Jul-01-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
